moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships are in their second week, with quarter-finals, semi-finals, and the highly anticipated Men's and Women's Singles Finals approaching by July 12.

angles.name: Centre Court Buzz
angles.copy: It's finals week at Wimbledon! Who are you backing to lift the trophies? Every serve, volley, and roar from Centre Court is making history.

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: As Wimbledon heats up, are there any British contenders left to cheer on? The grass court drama is reaching its peak!

angles.name: Strawberries & Cream
angles.copy: Beyond the tennis, it's all about the iconic Wimbledon experience. Strawberries and cream, Pimm's, and pure sporting theatre. What's your favourite part?

moments.title: British Grand Prix at Silverstone
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 British Grand Prix is underway this weekend at Silverstone, with practice, sprint qualifying, the sprint race, qualifying, and the main race all happening between July 3-5.

angles.name: Race Weekend Kicks Off
angles.copy: Lights out and away we go! The British Grand Prix weekend is officially ON at Silverstone. Who's taking pole in sprint qualifying today?

angles.name: Home Soil Advantage
angles.copy: British drivers on home turf! Expect electric atmosphere and high-speed drama at Silverstone. Who are you backing for the win?

angles.name: Silverstone Buzz
angles.copy: The roar of the engines, the smell of burnt rubber – Silverstone is alive! Are you trackside or watching from home this weekend?

moments.title: Tour de France Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France begins tomorrow, July 4th, in Barcelona, Spain, embarking on a three-week journey of intense cycling action.

angles.name: Grand Départ
angles.copy: The greatest show on two wheels starts tomorrow! The Tour de France 2026 begins in Barcelona. Get ready for three weeks of epic climbs and thrilling sprints.

angles.name: Who's Your Pick?
angles.copy: The yellow jersey battle is about to begin! Who do you think will dominate the mountains and time trials to win the Tour de France this year?

moments.title: FIFA World Cup Knockout Stages
moments.blurb: The 2026 FIFA World Cup is in full swing, with teams battling it out in the high-stakes knockout stages as the tournament progresses towards its final on July 19.

angles.name: World Cup Fever
angles.copy: World Cup knockout football is something else! Every game is do-or-die. Who's impressed you most so far?

angles.name: Penalty Shootout Drama
angles.copy: Are you ready for the tension of potential extra time and penalty shootouts? The World Cup knockouts are delivering pure drama!

moments.title: Metallica Live in London
moments.blurb: Metal legends Metallica are playing two 'No Repeat Weekend' shows at London Stadium on July 3rd and 5th as part of their M72 World Tour.

angles.name: Metal Mayhem
angles.copy: Metallica are hitting London Stadium tonight and Sunday with their 'No Repeat Weekend'! Two nights, two totally different setlists. Who's ready to headbang?

angles.name: London Rocks
angles.copy: The kings of metal, Metallica, are in London! If you're heading to the London Stadium, prepare for an epic night of classics and new tracks.

moments.title: Westival in Tenby
moments.blurb: The Westival music festival is taking place in Tenby, Wales, from July 2nd to 5th, offering a diverse lineup in a beautiful rural setting.

angles.name: Tenby Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Westival is in full swing near Tenby! If you're looking for a weekend of great music and good vibes in West Wales, it's happening now!

angles.name: Welsh Festival Fun
angles.copy: Heading to Westival this weekend? Sun, music, and stunning Welsh scenery – sounds like the perfect start to July!

moments.title: Bowling For Soup & Frank Turner in Cardiff
moments.blurb: Bowling For Soup and Frank Turner & The Sleeping Souls play Cardiff Castle tomorrow, Saturday July 4th.

angles.name: Cardiff Castle Rock
angles.copy: Get ready, Cardiff! Bowling For Soup AND Frank Turner & The Sleeping Souls are at Cardiff Castle tomorrow. Who's got their tickets?

angles.name: Pop-Punk & Folk-Punk
angles.copy: A double dose of awesome rock at Cardiff Castle tomorrow! Bowling For Soup and Frank Turner. Get ready for singalongs!

moments.title: Monmouth Medieval Festival
moments.blurb: The Monmouth Medieval Festival takes place this weekend, July 4-5, across multiple sites in Monmouth, offering historical reenactments and activities.

angles.name: Step Back in Time
angles.copy: Hear ye, hear ye! The Monmouth Medieval Festival is on this weekend! Immerse yourself in history with reenactments, crafts, and more.

angles.name: Family Fun in Monmouth
angles.copy: Looking for something different this weekend? The Monmouth Medieval Festival promises thrilling displays and family-friendly activities, July 4-5.

moments.title: Pride Caerffili
moments.blurb: Pride Caerffili is happening tomorrow, July 4th, with a day-long celebration including live entertainment and a Pride Parade.

angles.name: Celebrating Pride
angles.copy: Pride Caerffili is tomorrow! Join the celebrations with a parade and live entertainment. Let's make it a fantastic day!

angles.name: Caerffili Love
angles.copy: Get ready for a vibrant day of celebration at Pride Caerffili tomorrow, July 4th! Everyone welcome for a family-friendly event.

moments.title: Huey Lewis's Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, turns 76 on July 5th.

angles.name: Power of Love
angles.copy: He's still got the power of love! Huey Lewis turns 76 on Sunday. What's your favourite Huey Lewis and the News track?

angles.name: Legendary Voice
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 76th birthday to the legendary Huey Lewis this Sunday! His voice defined an era.

moments.title: Wolf Alice at Finsbury Park
moments.blurb: Wolf Alice headline their biggest show to date at London's Finsbury Park on Sunday, July 5th, with special guests including The Last Dinner Party.

angles.name: Indie Rock Takeover
angles.copy: Wolf Alice are set to tear up Finsbury Park this Sunday for their biggest headline show yet! Who's joining them for an epic day?

angles.name: London's Big Gig
angles.copy: Finsbury Park is calling! Wolf Alice are headlining a massive outdoor show this Sunday. Get ready for some incredible live music.

moments.title: Ringo Starr's Birthday
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Peace & Love
angles.copy: Peace and love! The one and only Ringo Starr turns 86 on Tuesday. What's your favourite Ringo moment, solo or with The Beatles?

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the iconic Ringo Starr this Tuesday! A true legend of music history.

moments.title: Henley Festival Begins
moments.blurb: The Henley Festival, known for its eclectic mix of music, arts, and comedy, runs from July 8th to 12th, featuring acts like Boy George & Culture Club, Sugababes, and Ezra Collective.

angles.name: Festival by the River
angles.copy: Henley Festival kicks off next Wednesday! Five days of world-class music, comedy, and dining. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Star-Studded Lineup
angles.copy: Boy George & Culture Club, Sugababes, Lulu – the Henley Festival lineup is looking incredible! Starts July 8th.

moments.title: Courtney Love's Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and actress Courtney Love, known for her work with Hole, turns 62 on July 9th.

angles.name: Grunge Icon
angles.copy: Happy 62nd birthday to the iconic Courtney Love this Thursday! What's your favourite Hole track?

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Celebrating the fierce and unforgettable Courtney Love, who turns 62 on Thursday. A true rock force!

moments.title: Jessica Simpson's Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer, actress, and businesswoman Jessica Simpson celebrates her 46th birthday on July 10th.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Remember 'I Wanna Love You Forever'? Happy 46th birthday to the incredible Jessica Simpson this Friday!

angles.name: Happy Birthday Jess
angles.copy: From pop hits to fashion empire, Jessica Simpson turns 46 on Friday! Send her some birthday love!

moments.title: Suzanne Vega's Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', turns 67 on July 11th.

angles.name: Folk Icon
angles.copy: Happy 67th birthday to the distinctive voice of Suzanne Vega this Saturday! 'Luka' or 'Tom's Diner' – which is your favourite?

angles.name: A Distinctive Sound
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of the wonderfully unique Suzanne Vega, who turns 67 on Saturday. Her songs are timeless.

moments.title: UK Heatwave Forecast
moments.blurb: Heatwave conditions are forecast for parts of the UK, particularly the southeast, with temperatures expected to reach the low 30s Celsius by early next week.

angles.name: Sun's Out
angles.copy: Get ready for some serious sunshine! A heatwave is on the way for parts of the UK, with temperatures climbing towards the low 30s next week. Stay cool!

angles.name: Warm Weather Ahead
angles.copy: It's going to be a hot one! Remember to stay hydrated and look out for vulnerable friends and neighbours as the temperatures rise.

moments.title: The Open Championship Practice Days
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale begins its practice days on Sunday, July 12th, ahead of the main tournament play from July 16-19.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest Returns
angles.copy: The Claret Jug is almost back! Practice days for The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale start this Sunday. Who's your early favourite?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Beckons
angles.copy: The world's best golfers descend on Royal Birkdale for The Open practice days starting Sunday. Get ready for some links golf magic!
